gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id INNER JOIN colour AS T3 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T3.id WHERE T2.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics' AND T3.colour = 'Gold'
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN colour AS T2 ON T1.eye_colour_id = T2.id INNER JOIN publisher AS T3 ON T1.publisher_id = T3.id WHERE T2.colour = 'Gold' AND T3.publisher_name = 'Marvel Comics'
question: How many gold-eyed superheroes did Marvel Comics publish?
